displayName: Dyneema UHMWPE Spall Liner (DSM, SK99 fiber)
notes: Dyneema SK99 (UHMWPE) spall liner. RHAe ~0.25-0.35 per mm vs fragments — superior to aramid due to lower density (0.97 g/cm³ floats on water). Fiber tensile ~3.0 GPa. Used in M2A2 Bradley BUSK III, modern vehicle spall liners. Best mass efficiency for fragment protection. Melts/tears rather than shattering.
